name: The Strawberry Forest
description:
I literally just came up with a scenario for this character last minute. Which is great for me as I'll actually have something to post unlike last Halloween and Christmas. I will probably be making one with just the strawberry forest on my alt if get it. Anyways go eat so much sugar that you die of a heart attack or something.

And yes I did make this an anal vore bot because I can.

Also I while I was writing for the a definition for the Strawberry Forest I could not for the life of me decide whether or not to write a wall of text or write it as if I was creating a character. I chose to go with the former though I may change it in the future. I do plan to make this bot without Strawberry on my alt though it may take a while as I most likely will be remaking the definition for the Strawberry Forest itself.

On an unrelated note here's a random ass cat I found on Google images that I could not stop laughing at while making this bot:
creator: A_V_E
